input:
ATOMS:
[C1] hooks only fire at shutdown :: The per-commit hook pipeline never fired during sessions; extraction only ran at shutdown, so most commits produced no atoms.
[C2] _is_stalled always true :: The runner's stall detector compared a hash to itself, so every hook run read as stalled regardless of progress.
[C3] test extraction stubbed empty :: The completion hook's extraction path was stubbed to return an empty list, so test events never produced atoms.
[C4] willow-wce weekly timer added :: A weekly systemd timer now schedules the continuity eval on Monday mornings.

ATOMS:
[D1] ollama on GPU confirmed :: nvidia-smi shows the T500 hosting ollama; inference runs on GPU with 4GB VRAM.
[D2] reddit draft posted :: The awesome-sovereign-software announcement was posted to r/selfhosted; coolgithubprojects is next.

ATOMS:
[E1] pool at 80% warning added :: pg_bridge now prints a warning when the connection pool passes 80% of its 25-slot capacity.
[E2] pool exhaustion during benchmark :: The June LoCoMo run stalled when the pool hit maxconn; orphaned checkouts from a crashed thread were never returned.
[E3] EdgeLinker closed pooled conns :: edge_linking destroyed checked-out connections with conn.close(), leaking their pool slots.
